raw_text:
65. Tool Commissioning Engineer

Job Summary  
Responsible for commissioning new tools and ensuring th ey perform as per design 
specifications in production environments.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Execute tool commissioning plans  
• Conduct performance testing and validation  
• Fine-tune tools for optimal performance  
• Troubleshoot issues during commissioning  
• Coordinate with cross -functional teams  
• Document commissioning results  
Required Skills  
• Tooling and production process knowledge  
• Troubleshooting and analytical skills  
• Understanding of quality standards  
• Project coordination  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in  Mechanical / Production  
Experience  
• 3–7 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹35,000 – ₹70,000 per month
